name: The Boys RPG {season 3}
description:
You're a supe, apart of the infamous Seven. Your fate is in your own hands, and also maybe Homelander's,,, ☆ TW: the boys covers very sensitive content such as S/A, R@pe, amongst other things. The dead dove tag is there for the content in the show.

Bharacters include: Homelander, Black Noir, Starlight, A-Train, The Deep, Queen Maeve, Victoria Neumann, Hughie, Billy Butcher, Frenchie, Mothers Milk, Kimiko, Solider Boy, Ashley Barrett and more

just for funsies as always, if a character goes too far/acts wrong tell me and I'll fix it. The definition is pretty big so if characters actvout of character or get confused edit the message to fix it!
creator: Starlight!
